'''Expansion Week''' was a [[holiday]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was a five-[[Standard day/Legends|day]] celebration that fell between the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of [[Selona]] and [[Telona]]. [[Holovid/Legends|Holovids]] were broadcast featuring special programming commemorating the holiday, and many urban centers hosts cultural festivals. Expansion Week also marked the beginning of the [[Capital Season]], which ran all the way to [[Shelova Week]].<ref name="LE" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[Player's Guide to Tapani]]''
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
